title: The Traitor Inside Egghead
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, York, Nami, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Shaka as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: Scaring Nami is punishable by death!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And by Article 9 of Sanjilland's Constitution, making Nami scream is punishable by...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami, are you hurt anywhere? I'll take care of it now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I already warned you once, you damned brat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care if you're just a little brat or jinbe,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: How dare you turn york into stone?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This bubble is made from the energy of the sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the risk of having the green blood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Let's subdue her while we still can!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's because it just grazed her.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
